findings.title: Weak password length requirement allows passwords under 8 characters
findings.message: Weak password length requirement detected (CWE-521). Password validation accepts passwords shorter than 8 characters. Enforce at least 8 characters per NIST SP 800-63B.

findings.title: Hardcoded secret key in JWT encode call
findings.message: Hardcoded secret in JWT encode/decode call (CWE-798). JWT signing keys MUST NOT be hardcoded in source code. Use environment variables or a secrets manager.

findings.title: Session configured without expiry in Django settings
findings.message: Session configured without expiry (CWE-613). Setting SESSION_COOKIE_AGE to None disables session expiration. Configure a reasonable session timeout.
